title: Forms to Workdoc

posts.author: Featherheart (Victoria May)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Morning!

I am trying to create an Intake form that will form- fill a workdoc.

Ideally, we would want someone to fill out the form, and then whatever they fill in to populate on a document. I have searched and I am unable to find any answers for if this is even possible, but I am admittedly new to the platform. Any help would be very much appreciated!

Thank you!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Featherheart

Welcome to the Community!

Currently all form submissions will create a new item on a board.
It isn’t possible to have these form submissions populate a Workdoc, I’m afraid.
That said, you can embed a board into a Workdoc.
This would allow you to see all of your form submissions directly within the Workdoc, without needing to open the board itself.

Could this be an option for you?

Best,

Dani
